data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. SAXON KELTON was strongly fancied latest and proved too good with a 1.3 lengths win at this track in a handy 19.41. Awkwardly drawn but goes well at this distance. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minor placings. One of the key runners again. 8. MISS CHARMED has missed the frame at last two runs but could not have been more impressive the run prior in her handy 19.37 win at this track over 350m. Should be in this for a long way. 7. WALTZING BRUTE was below best at his last couple, the latest finishing sixth at Warragul, but was among the placings at this track three back. Can find the frame this time. 3. CAUSING RUBBLE was out of the frame here most recently but can atone.","runners":[4,8,7,3],"exclusive":false}
